title: Refine datasheet visual style
description: Adjust the static site CSS and homepage presentation to more closely match the provided datasheet reference style.
close_reason: Implemented datasheet-inspired header, homepage, tables, footer, and responsive CSS refinements.

title: Theses: markdown intro text rendered as raw string
description:
Su /theses/, *Available thesis directions* (.thesis-card p), il contenuto deriva da excerptFromMarkdown(thesis.__content) ma viene visualizzato come stringa di markdown raw invece che renderizzato in HTML.

## Cosa fare
- Verificare src/data/public-content.ts excerptFromMarkdown(): se restituisce markdown grezzo, sostituire con un render markdown → HTML (es. marked, remark, rehype) oppure usare Astro Content collection rendering (Content component) per il body del thesis.
- Decidere se mostrare un excerpt plain-text (strip markdown) o HTML renderizzato.

## Acceptance
- Il blocco descrittivo della thesis card mostra testo formattato correttamente, non markdown raw.
close_reason: Closed

title: Courses: Latest academic year card too tall
description:
Su /courses/, la card del corso corrente (Latest academic year, .detail-card--accent) è troppo alta — molto whitespace in basso.

## Cosa fare
- Verificare se .detail-card o .item-grid--two forzano altezza uguale tra elementi quando il grid ha 1 sola card.
- Ridurre padding o min-height.

## Acceptance
- Altezza della card proporzionale al contenuto (titolo + level + ore/crediti).
close_reason: Closed

title: Research: drop gray boxes for sub-area tag-list pills
description:
Su /research/, sezione *Current research areas*, ogni area mostra una lista di keyword come tag pills con sfondo grigio (bg_code o border_soft). Visivamente troppo pesante per il datasheet voice.

## Cosa fare
- Rimuovere background dai .tag-list li (o variante usata nelle .detail-card delle research areas).
- Mantenere il testo, rendere i tag inline mono-uppercase senza box, oppure separati da bullet (·).

## Acceptance
- Le sotto-aree appaiono come lista in-line di label mono, senza box grigi.
close_reason: Closed

title: Bio: Degrees cards too tall
description:
Su /bio/, le card *Degrees* (h2 Degrees, item-grid--two) sono troppo alte rispetto al contenuto — molto vuoto in basso.

## Cosa fare
- Verificare CSS di .detail-card e .item-grid--two in src/styles/global.css.
- Ridurre padding interno, eliminare min-height ereditate o flex-1 inutili.

## Acceptance
- Card Degrees con altezza proporzionale al contenuto (Master + PhD).
close_reason: Closed

title: Blog: post titles wrap too narrow in listing
description:
Su /blog/, i titoli dei post nell'elenco hanno una colonna troppo stretta e wrappano su più righe.

## Cosa fare
- Verificare CSS di .blog-card / .blog-list / .blog-card h2 in src/styles/global.css.
- Allargare la colonna del titolo o aumentare max-width, oppure rimuovere costrizioni ereditate da h2 globale.

## Acceptance
- Titoli post leggibili senza wrap inutile su viewport desktop tipico (≥980px).
close_reason: Closed

title: repo:bugfix - styling nit-picks (vz-ds.5 polish)
description:
Raccolta di rifiniture stilistiche emerse dopo la chiusura di vz-ds.5, riportate dall'utente in sessione 2026-06-11. Cinque difetti distinti su pagine diverse del sito statico.

## Pagine e difetti

1. **Blog (post listing)**: i titoli dei post sono troppo stretti e wrappano su più righe in modo sgradevole.
2. **Bio /bio/**: le card di *Degrees* sono troppo alte.
3. **Research /research/**: nella sezione *Current research areas*, i box grigi delle sotto-aree (tag pills) non piacciono — visivamente troppo pesanti.
4. **Courses /courses/**: la card del *Latest academic year* (current) è troppo alta.
5. **Theses /theses/**: il testo delle thesis cards proviene da markdown ma viene mostrato come stringa raw — manca il render markdown.

## Done when

Tutti e 5 i punti risolti e visivamente accettabili, build verde, push fatto.
close_reason: all steps complete

title: Datasheet voice (mono labels uppercase, section markers)
description:
Fase 5/5. Adottare i pattern di voce datasheet: label mono uppercase con tracking, section markers §N.N in blue. Dipende da vz-ds.4.

## Cosa fare

1. Identificare label e meta UI (es. category tags, breadcrumb, footer meta, table headers, form labels):
   - font: var(--ds-fonts-mono)
   - text-transform: uppercase
   - letter-spacing: var(--ds-tracking-wide) (≈ 0.1em)
   - dimensione: var(--ds-sizes-print-xs) o sm a scelta
2. Section markers nei titoli di sezione:
   - prefisso §1.1, §1.2, etc.
   - font mono in var(--ds-colors-accent) (blue)
   - testo del titolo in fg normale
3. Verificare titoli di pagina e gerarchia heading (h1 .. h4).
4. Voice check:
   - nessuna emoji nei testi UI generati
   - nessun exclamation mark in CTA o microcopy
   - tono quiet, academic-practical
5. Italian/English split: titoli corso italiani restano italiani; resto inglese (vedi README spec).

## Acceptance

- Mono labels uppercase con tracking visibili su category tags / table headers / breadcrumb / footer meta.
- Section markers §N.N applicati alle sezioni principali delle route.
- Nessuna emoji o exclamation mark nei testi UI.
- Italian/English split rispettato.

## Riferimenti

- Spec voice + visual: ../vz-personal-store/design-system/README.md
- SKILL.md hard rules section.
notes: Scope esteso (concordato in sessione 2026-06-11): include riduzione scala heading (h1 era clamp fino a 8rem) e cap dimensione foto profilo (quadrata, ~220px).
close_reason: Datasheet voice applied: mono uppercase tracked labels (eyebrow/section-kicker/meta/metric-strip), §N section markers in accent on all main index pages, heading scale downsized (h1 max 2.6rem), profile photo capped 200px square. Build green.

title: Shape conventions (zero radii, zero shadows, ink borders)
description:
Fase 4/5. Allineare le convenzioni di forma del sito alla direzione datasheet. Dipende da vz-ds.3.

## Cosa fare

1. Azzerare tutti i border-radius nei componenti UI:
   - card, button, input, badge, code block, image frame, etc.
   - usare var(--ds-radius-none) (o 0 se il token è 0) ovunque.
2. Rimuovere tutti i box-shadow:
   - var(--ds-shadow-none) o nessuna shadow.
   - eccezione solo se ADR documenta caso d'uso (non al momento).
3. Standardizzare i border come ink rules:
   - thin: var(--ds-border_width-thin) → 1px
   - med: var(--ds-border_width-med) → 2px
   - heavy: var(--ds-border_width-heavy) → 3px
   - colore: var(--ds-colors-border) (#0b0d10 ink) o border_soft per separatori discreti.

## Acceptance

- Nessun border-radius > 0 nei CSS del sito (esclusi avatar circolari se decisi essere eccezione — flaggare in PR).
- Nessun box-shadow nei CSS del sito.
- Tutti i border espressi via token --ds-border_width-*.
- Visual: l'UI ha il look ink/datasheet, senza morbidezza.

## Hard rule

Zero radii. Zero shadows. Borders 1/2/3 px ink rules. Vedi SKILL.md.

## Out of scope

- Mono labels uppercase e section markers (vz-ds.5).
close_reason: Shape conventions enforced: removed --shadow var and its use, zeroed tag-pill__count radius via --ds-radius-flat, all literal border widths replaced with --ds-border_width-bw1/bw3 tokens. Build green.

title: Accent palette swap (teal #1b6f6a -> blue #1756e0)
description:
Fase 3/5. Sostituire la palette accent corrente teal con il blue datasheet via token DS. Dipende da vz-ds.2.

## Cosa fare

1. Grep su src/ per #1b6f6a e tutte le sue varianti (hover/visited/derivate).
2. Sostituire con:
   - accent base: var(--ds-colors-accent) → #1756e0
   - accent hover: var(--ds-colors-accent_hover) → #0f42b8
   - accent deep: var(--ds-colors-accent_deep) → #0b3a9e
   - accent soft (background): var(--ds-colors-accent_soft) → #e6edff
   - link: var(--ds-colors-link)
   - link hover: var(--ds-colors-link_hover)
   - link visited: var(--ds-colors-link_visited)
3. Verificare semantici: success/warning/danger/info se in uso → var(--ds-colors-success|warning|danger|info).
4. Verificare foreground neutrals: fg/fg1/fg2/fg3 e border/border_heavy/border_soft/border_subtle.
5. Visual diff completo su tutte le route.

## Acceptance

- Nessun #1b6f6a residuo in src/.
- Tutti i link, CTA, accent UI usano #1756e0.
- Hover/visited/active distinguibili.
- npm run build passa.
- A11y: contrasti AA mantenuti (verificare blue su bianco e su bg_sunken).

## Hard rule

Single accent. Niente secondo accent. Niente gradient. Vedi SKILL.md.

## Out of scope

- Borders/radii/shadows (vz-ds.4).
close_reason: Closed

title: Typography baseline (IBM Plex Sans/Mono/Serif)
description:
Fase 2/5. Sostituire il font corrente con la famiglia IBM Plex tramite i token DS. Dipende da vz-ds.1 (infrastruttura import).

## Cosa fare

1. Identificare tutti gli usi del font corrente (probabilmente Inter o system stack) in src/styles/ e src/layouts/.
2. Sostituire con:
   - body: var(--ds-fonts-sans) → IBM Plex Sans
   - code, kbd, pre, samp, mono labels: var(--ds-fonts-mono) → IBM Plex Mono
   - eventuali display serif: var(--ds-fonts-serif) → IBM Plex Serif
3. Verificare i pesi disponibili dai @font-face in fonts.css (Thin 100, ExtraLight 200, Light 300, Regular 400, Text 450, Medium 500, SemiBold 600, Bold 700; più italic varianti).
4. Aggiornare eventuali font-weight numerici se la corrispondenza con la famiglia precedente non è 1:1.
5. Build + visual diff: confronto screenshot prima/dopo su / /bio /research /courses /theses.

## Acceptance

- Nessun riferimento a font diverso da IBM Plex nei CSS del sito.
- Tutte e 5 le route renderizzano con IBM Plex Sans per il body.
- Code blocks e mono labels usano IBM Plex Mono.
- npm run build passa.
- Nessun layout shift macroscopico (font metrics diverse → eventualmente aggiustare line-height via var(--ds-leading-*)).

## Out of scope

- Cambio colori (vz-ds.3).
- Mono labels uppercase + tracking (vz-ds.5 — fa parte della voice datasheet).
close_reason: Closed

title: Pull infrastructure (sync-ds.sh + import in BaseLayout)
description:
Fase 1/5 dell'adozione design system. Solo infrastruttura — nessun consumo di token ancora, palette teal corrente resta invariata.

## Cosa fare

1. Scrivere scripts/sync-ds.sh alla radice del repo:
   - DS_ROOT default a ../vz-personal-store/design-system (override via env)
   - invoca node $DS_ROOT/scripts/build.mjs
   - copia tokens.css, fonts.css, fonts/ in src/styles/ds/
2. Aggiungere src/styles/ds/ a .gitignore (non vendoriamo gli artifact).
3. Import in src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro:
   - @import "../styles/ds/fonts.css"
   - @import "../styles/ds/tokens.css"
4. Verificare build pulita: npm run build deve riuscire senza errori.
5. Verificare in dev (npm run dev) che i custom property --ds-* siano visibili nei devtools (es. --ds-colors-accent risolve a #1756e0).
6. Documentare in AGENTS.md il pin: git SHA del monorepo vz-personal-store + comando per ri-sync.

## Acceptance

- sync-ds.sh esiste e funziona da repo root.
- src/styles/ds/ ignorato in .gitignore.
- BaseLayout importa tokens.css e fonts.css.
- npm run build passa.
- Devtools mostra var(--ds-colors-accent) = #1756e0 (anche se non ancora usata).
- AGENTS.md menziona il pin SHA.

## Riferimenti

- Skill: ../vz-personal-store/design-system/SKILL.md (mode 1: Onboard a consumer)
- Pilot Typst (filosofia pull, diversa toolchain): ../materiale-corsi/aos/courses/common/templates/sync-ds.sh

## Out of scope (fasi successive)

- vz-ds.2 — typography (sostituire font corrente)
- vz-ds.3 — accent palette swap (teal → blue)
- vz-ds.4 — shape conventions (radii/shadows/borders)
- vz-ds.5 — datasheet voice (mono labels, section markers)
close_reason: Closed

title: Adozione design system in vz-static-site
description: Allineare vz-static-site al design system AOS Lab (datasheet direction) tramite il flusso pull documentato nella skill aos-lab-design (../vz-personal-store/design-system/SKILL.md). Sostituire la palette teal #1b6f6a corrente con il blue datasheet #1756e0 e adottare IBM Plex Sans/Mono/Serif. Pin via git SHA del monorepo vz-personal-store. Adozione parked finora in pm/design-system/plan.md del monorepo.

title: Update imported asset contract after export filtering
description: The updated private export removes data/imported/assets/Logo.* and adds blog-local assets under data/imported/blog/images. Public validation still expects the removed logo files, and the Astro blog collection glob currently includes nested image/excalidraw markdown files. Update the public contract and collection globs to match the filtered export.
design: Treat data/imported/blog/*.md as blog posts. Treat data/imported/blog/images/** as assets, not content entries. Do not require data/imported/assets/Logo.* in the public imported-tree validator.
notes: Updated the public contract for the filtered private export. Removed data/imported/assets/Logo.* from required imported files, treated data/imported/blog/images/** as blog assets, restricted the Astro blog collection to top-level data/imported/blog/*.md so nested Excalidraw markdown files are ignored, ignored data/imported/blog/.other/, and added validation that relative blog image links resolve to imported asset files. Verification: npm run data:check:strict passed; npm run content:check passed and still validates 10 top-level blog posts; all relative blog image links resolve; npm run ci passed with 0 Astro errors/warnings/hints.
close_reason: Updated the public imported asset contract for the filtered export and verified data/content/build checks.

title: Remove erroneous projectsData import from content model
description: data/imported/projectsData.js was imported by mistake and should not be part of the public data contract or content-model validation. Remove it from expected imported files, docs, validation scripts, committed imported tree, and PM notes.
design: Keep research/project information sourced from cv-jr.yaml for now. Do not validate or import projectsData.js in vz-static-site.
notes:
Removed erroneous projectsData.js import from the public model. Deleted data/imported/projectsData.js from the committed imported tree, removed it from scripts/check-imported-data.mjs expected files, removed project-card validation from scripts/validate-content-model.ts, removed projectSchema/projectsSchema exports from src/data/content-model.ts, and updated docs/handoff. Verification: npm run data:check:strict passed; npm run content:check passed and no longer reports projects; npm run ci passed with 0 Astro errors/warnings/hints; git diff --check passed.
CI diagnosis: GitHub Actions failed on commit 6885156 because astro check type-checked scripts/validate-content-model.ts without Node type definitions, producing errors for node:fs/promises, node:path, process, and implicit any in readdir filters. Added @types/node pinned to the Node 22 major used by .node-version/CI. Local npm run ci passes after the fix.
close_reason: Removed projectsData.js from the imported data contract and content-model validation because it was an erroneous private export artifact.

title: Simplify public data pipeline to consume imported sanitized files
description: The private repo already owns sanitization and writes sanitized outputs to data/imported/. Remove the second public allowlist/sanitizer from vz-site.2 and replace it with a structural validator for the imported file tree documented in ../vz-personal-store/pm/website/handoff-vz-static-site.md.
design: Public repo no longer re-sanitizes private data. The private repo export-public script owns allowlist/redaction and writes data/imported/. This repo runs data:check to validate the imported tree shape and parseability, with an explicit --require-imported option for strict checks after export.
notes: Correction applied: removed the duplicate public allowlist/sanitizer from vz-site.2 and deleted the public fixture/generated output. The public repo now only validates the imported sanitized tree contract from data/imported/: expected files/directories, non-empty required files, and JSON parseability. It does not maintain field allowlists, private deny strings, or redaction rules; those remain in ../vz-personal-store/pm/website/export-allowlist.yaml. Verification: rg found no stale references to public-data.allowlist, sync-public-data, data:sync, or src/data/generated; npm run data:check passed with the expected missing-export warning; npm run data:check:strict failed as expected because data/imported is absent; git diff --check passed; npm run ci passed.
close_reason: Removed duplicate public sanitization from vz-site.2. Public repo now consumes data/imported/ as the private repo handoff and only validates structure/basic parseability per ADR 003.

title: Add temporary GitHub Pages project deploy
description: Add a GitHub Pages deployment path for testing the Astro build at https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/ before the later custom-domain preview deploy. Keep local development rooted at / and make the Pages base path configurable only for the deploy build.
design: Use SITE_URL and SITE_BASE env vars in astro.config.mjs. Local default remains /; Pages test build sets SITE_URL=https://vzaccaria.github.io and SITE_BASE=/vz-static-site. Deploy dist with GitHub Pages actions.
notes: Final verification: GitHub Pages API reports html_url=https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/, cname=null, https_enforced=true. curl -I -L https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/ returns HTTP 200 from GitHub Pages. www.vittoriozaccaria.net still returns HTTP 200 from Vercel. Decision recorded in pm/adr/002-github-pages-project-preview-routing.md.
close_reason: Temporary GitHub Pages project deploy is working at https://vzaccaria.github.io/vz-static-site/ and routing decision is documented in ADR 002.

title: Repair beads issue prefix mismatch
description: bd config reports issue_prefix = vz-static-site, while existing project issues use explicit IDs like vz-site.0 and vz-site.1. A normal bd create failed with a prefix mismatch during vz-site.1. Decide whether to migrate IDs/config or document an explicit --id convention so future issue intake does not require --force.
notes: Fixed by setting database issue_prefix to vz-site. Verification: bd config show reports issue_prefix = vz-site, bd create --dry-run --parent vz-site succeeds, and bd create --dry-run --id vz-site.1 succeeds without requiring --force. Follow-up migration: renamed all numbered issues from the legacy compact convention to vz-site.0 through vz-site.15, preserving the root epic as vz-site. Repository documentation was updated to match the dotted issue ID convention.
close_reason: Aligned beads database issue_prefix to vz-site and verified vz-site.* issue IDs are accepted without --force.

title: Cutover produzione
description: Preparare e svolgere lo switch finale verso www.vittoriozaccaria.net. Criteri: DNS finale documentato, rollback documentato, produzione verificata, vecchio sito Next dichiarato dismesso o parcheggiato.

title: Parity check con sito attuale
description: Confrontare il nuovo sito con l'inventario esistente. Criteri: route principali confrontate con website/docs/audit.md della repo privata, link checker, smoke test su viste chiave, differenze accettate documentate.

title: Preview deploy
description: Configurare deploy automatico del sito di sviluppo. Criteri: preview raggiungibile su preview.vittoriozaccaria.net o URL equivalente, deploy su push alla branch principale, smoke test post-deploy documentato.

title: Feed sitemap SEO e asset
description: Generare feed, sitemap, canonical URL, metadata OpenGraph e asset statici. Criteri: feed.xml valido, sitemap.xml valido, preview/prod site URL configurabili, asset referenziati con path statici corretti.
close_reason: Completed feed.xml, sitemap.xml, SEO metadata, configurable URL handling, and static blog asset path support.

title: Blog, tag e compatibilita URL
description: Implementare blog statico, pagina elenco, pagine post, tag index e tag detail. Criteri: Markdown/MDX renderizzato staticamente, tag e paginazione se necessaria, compatibilità URL con il sito attuale dove possibile.
close_reason: Closed

title: Viste statiche core
description: Implementare le viste statiche principali: home, bio/research, courses e theses. Criteri: route generate staticamente, dati presi dal content model pubblico, layout responsive, nessuna dipendenza da API o server runtime.
close_reason: Implemented static home, bio, research, courses, and theses routes with build-time public content helpers and a local avatar fallback asset.

title: Content model e validazione
description: Definire schemi e convenzioni per CV pubblico, blog/frontmatter, publications, courses e theses. Criteri: validazione in build/CI, fallimento esplicito su campi mancanti o non previsti, struttura contenuti stabile.
notes: Implemented content model validation on top of the sanitized data/imported export. Added src/data/content-model.ts with strict Zod schemas for public CV, teaching courses, bibliography records, theses, project cards, blog frontmatter, author frontmatter, and required markdown bodies. Added scripts/validate-content-model.ts and npm run content:check. Astro content collections now read data/imported/blog and data/imported/authors. npm run check now requires data:check:strict, content:check, and astro check. Committed sanitized imported tree is 22 files / 616K; .gitattributes preserves generated whitespace for data/imported while allowing git diff --check to pass. Verification: npm run content:check validates public CV, 112 bibliography records, 3 theses, 2 projects, 2 authors, and 10 blog posts; npm run ci passes with 0 Astro errors/warnings/hints; git diff --cached --check passes.
close_reason: Added strict imported content model validation, Astro blog/author collections from data/imported, and CI enforcement for the sanitized public data tree.

title: Pipeline dati pubblici sanitizzati
description: Definire e implementare la pipeline che importa dati dalla repo privata senza leak. Criteri: allowlist esplicita dei campi esportati, output pubblico validabile, comando documentato per sync periodico, nessun dato privato copiato per default.
design: Allowlist-first JSON pipeline. data/public-data.allowlist.json defines public fields; scripts/sync-public-data.mjs copies only those fields from an explicit --source; src/data/generated/public-data.json is the committed public artifact; npm run data:check validates allowlist compliance and is part of npm run check/CI. ADR 003 records the decision.
notes: Verified: npm run data:sync:example; npm run data:check; npm run data:sync -- --source data/private-export.example.json --dry-run; npm run ci; git diff --check. Also verified npm run data:sync without --source fails intentionally to avoid default private imports.
close_reason: Allowlisted public data pipeline, generated output validation, documented sync command, and no-default-private-import behavior are implemented and verified.

title: Scaffold Astro e toolchain locale
description: Creare lo scaffold del sito statico con Astro. Criteri: npm run dev/build/preview/check funzionano, struttura src/content/data impostata, nessun runtime server richiesto, CI build-only pronta per PR/push.
design: Astro 6 static scaffold with npm scripts, strict tsconfig, src/content blog collection placeholder, src/data metadata/navigation, BaseLayout, index/404 pages, static favicon, and GitHub Actions CI using npm ci + check + build.
notes: Verified: npm ci; npm run check; npm run build; npm run ci; npm run dev served http://127.0.0.1:4321/; npm run preview served http://127.0.0.1:4322/. Astro telemetry is disabled in npm scripts to avoid writing outside the repo during agent/sandbox runs.
close_reason: Astro/npm scaffold, content/data structure, CI workflow, and required dev/build/preview/check commands are implemented and verified.

title: Decisione architetturale e setup ambienti
description: Formalizzare la scelta: repo pubblica separata vz-static-site, SSG statico, preview su dominio dedicato, produzione su vittoriozaccaria.net e Dynadot come registrar/DNS. Artefatti: ADR iniziale, ambienti local/preview/prod documentati, DNS atteso.
design: Accepted ADR 001: Astro static site in a separate public repository, GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages, preview custom domain first, production custom domain www.vittoriozaccaria.net at cutover, Dynadot DNS records documented.
close_reason: ADR 001 documents the accepted static-site architecture, local/preview/production environment contract, and expected Dynadot/GitHub Pages DNS records.

title: Nuovo sito statico pubblico
description: Ricostruire il sito personale come SSG fully static in una repo pubblica separata, con sviluppo locale semplice, preview su dominio dedicato, deploy finale su vittoriozaccaria.net, e pipeline sicura per importare solo dati pubblici dalle sorgenti private.

title: Track @astrojs/check YAML audit advisory
description: npm audit reports a moderate dev-only advisory through @astrojs/check -> @astrojs/language-server -> yaml-language-server -> yaml. npm audit --omit=dev reports 0 vulnerabilities, and npm audit fix --force would downgrade @astrojs/check, so keep the current scaffold working and revisit when upstream publishes a non-breaking fix.
notes: Created during vz-site.1 because npm audit has no non-breaking fix for the dev-only @astrojs/check chain.

value: lesson/vz-site-gge/renderMarkdownExcerpt: Exported from src/data/public-content.ts. Renders markdown to HTML with optional truncation. Use with Fragment set:html in Astro templates.
lesson/vz-site-gge/tag-list--light: Use .tag-list--light for tag pills without background fill. Applied on research page sub-area keywords.

lesson/vz-site/withBasePath: withBasePath() in src/data/site.ts is the single shared utility for base-URL-safe links and asset paths. All pages must import it from there — never recompute basePath locally. Needed because SITE_BASE may be /vz-static-site/ for GitHub Pages project deploys.

Datasheet section markers: use §N inline before h1/h2 text. Class .section-marker is mono + accent color. Page-local sequential numbering (§1, §2 ...) reads cleaner than hierarchical §1.1 given shallow page IA. Mono uppercase labels: classes .eyebrow / .section-kicker / .meta / .label--mono all use --ds-fonts-mono + --ds-tracking-label (0.1em); --ds-tracking-wide is only 0.04em despite bead text saying ~0.1em.

Imported blog markdown images under data/imported/blog/images are served by npm run assets:sync, which copies them into ignored public/static/blog/images; astro.config.mjs rewrites Markdown images/ URLs through SITE_BASE-safe /static/blog/images paths.
lesson/vz-site/avatar-asset: imported author frontmatter may point to a broken external avatar URL; serve the profile image from public/static/images/avatar.jpg and keep data/imported read-only.

DS shape tokens in src/styles/ds/tokens.css use names: --ds-radius-flat (0px), --ds-radius-sm (0px), --ds-radius-md/lg (2.67px); --ds-border_width-bw1 (1.33px) / bw2 (2.67px) / bw3 (4px); --ds-shadow-flat/sm/md (all 'none'). Bead text may reference *-none/thin/med/heavy — those aliases do NOT exist. Use bw1/bw2/bw3 and *-flat in CSS.
lesson/vz-site-gge/detail-card-gap: .detail-card now uses gap:0.6rem and align-content:start for tighter spacing and no equal-height stretching.
